launches.name: ZeroHuman.
launches.tagline: Your AI Co-Founder: OpenClaw x Paperclip x Spud
launches.description: Start or grow your business while you sleep. Use AI to run tasks, validate ideas, build products, and grow your business — all on autopilot.

launches.name: Gemini Personal Intelligence
launches.tagline: Gemini answers with context from your Google apps
launches.description: A personalisation layer for Gemini that reads your Google apps and past chats. Built for personal Google account holders who want context-aware responses without re-explaining themselves.

launches.name: Inrō AI
launches.tagline: Your AI Agent for Instagram Marketing
launches.description: Inrō's AI Agent handles your Instagram DMs end-to-end. Set a goal, train it on your knowledge, and let it engage your audience, qualify leads, book calls and follow up on its own. AI is also built into every automation step, detecting intent, branching on conditions, and handing off to the agent mid-flow. Describe what you want and Inrō builds the automation for you. Connects to Claude, ChatGPT, Shopify, Stripe and 8,000+ tools. Meta-approved, join 10000+ brands and creators today!

launches.name: Clawdi
launches.tagline: Best home for all AI agents
launches.description: Clawdi lets you run AI agents like OpenClaw and Hermes in cloud without setup, stop losing your agent setup every time you switch frameworks. The open-source environment that decouples your memory, API keys, and skills from the agent engine.

launches.name: MiMo-V2.5 Voice
launches.tagline: Bilingual ASR for dialects, code-switching, and songs
launches.description: MiMo-V2.5-ASR is an 8B open-source speech recognition model from Xiaomi that transcribes Mandarin, English, eight Chinese dialects, code-switched speech, and song lyrics. Built for ML engineers, researchers, and developers building real-world voice applications.

launches.name: Grok Voice Think Fast 1.0
launches.tagline: Our most capable voice agent is now available via API
launches.description: A state-of-the-art voice model built for complex, multi-step workflows with snappy responses and high accuracy.

launches.name: PromptPaste
launches.tagline: Your private AI prompt library on Mac, iPhone, and iPad
launches.description: PromptPaste is a native Apple app that saves your AI prompts across Mac, iPhone, and iPad. Hit ⌘⇧P from the Mac menu bar to copy any prompt instantly. Build dynamic templates with {{variables}}, organize by folder, and share collections with a link. No account - your prompts stay on your device.

launches.name: Euphony
launches.tagline: Render AI chat data and Codex logs into browsable views
launches.description: Visualizes Harmony JSON/JSONL conversations and Codex CLI session logs as interactive, filterable timelines in the browser. For AI engineers debugging agent workflows and teams building on gpt-oss models.

launches.name: Architecto
launches.tagline: Design, review, and document cloud architecture with AI
launches.description: Describe what you want to build. Architecto generates the architecture, runs security and cost analysis, and creates technical docs. One platform for design, review, and documentation across clouds.

launches.name: Regent
launches.tagline: Know when your AI changes behavior
launches.description: Reliability is the next frontier for AI apps. We were already shipping MVPs. It's time to turn them into products. Existing observability tools do for LLM apps what logs did for conventional ones: they tell you what happened, not what changed. Regent is the first regression testing layer for agentic apps. It can run semantic diffs on your agent's entire execution trace for any critical inputs, all before you merge the PR. Posts the results right in your Github. No more finding out from users.

launches.name: Content Marketing Ideas
launches.tagline: AI powered content research and production engine
launches.description: Generate fresh content ideas from sources your competitors don't read. Editorial briefs with keyword data, voice-matched drafts, and one-click WordPress publishing. Free to start. We’re building an AI-powered content engine for marketers, founders, and creators that automatically discovers trends, generates data-backed ideas, and turns them into ready-to-publish content, so you never waste time on research or guesswork again.

launches.name: LAEYR
launches.tagline: A smarter way to produce music with AI
launches.description: LAEYR is Figma for music production, an AI-powered studio for producers. It helps create, experiment, and finish songs faster within existing workflows. Generate MIDI ideas, edit stems, structure arrangements, and automate repetitive tasks. Producers stay in control while using LAEYR to explore ideas, iterate quickly, and turn rough concepts into finished tracks.

launches.name: ReteAi
launches.tagline: Your own AI. On your Mac. No subscription, ever
launches.description: Mesh your Apple devices into a local AI supercomputer. Rete runs models like Llama and Mistral on your Mac — and pools compute from your iPhone, iPad, or friends' Macs to handle larger models. Fully private: conversations stay on your network. Works offline. No accounts, no subscriptions, no data harvesting. One payment of $20, yours forever. Stop renting AI and start owning it.

launches.name: ClawRapid
launches.tagline: OpenClaw secured in less than a minute
launches.description: ClawRapid prepares the server, hardens OpenClaw, and launches it for you. Pick Claude, GPT or Gemini, connect a channel, and your assistant is already live.

launches.name: Discovr AI
launches.tagline: AI-Powered SEO & GEO to Attract Leads from Google & AI
launches.description: Discovr AI gets your business recommended by Google and AI search engines like ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity; through AI-Powered SEO & GEO organic marketing execution. SEO & GEO co-pilot for non-experts, Rank tools for expert SEO & GEO insights, Competitor gaps, AI Rank Tracking, Blog automation & content calendar, brand alerts, and Ekko, an always-on AI marketing strategist. Stop briefing. Start ranking.

launches.name: Nomakkin
launches.tagline: On-demand investigations and risk intelligence
launches.description: Nomakkin is a unified investigations and risk intelligence platform that replaces fragmented, manual, and slow investigative processes with structured, on-demand execution. Unlike traditional agencies or point tools that focus on a single function, Nomakkin integrates private investigations, background checks, fraud analysis, fugitive tracking, and risk monitoring into one operational system. It is designed for real-world cases where speed, coordination, and reliability matter.

launches.name: PrintMakerAI
launches.tagline: Describe a part. AI builds it, views it, fixes it & renders
launches.description: Describe the part you need and get a printable result fast. Build custom enclosures, Gridfinity bins, cable clips, brackets, and desk parts from plain English. Choose from draw2CAD, Describe-It, Scan an Object With Phone - powered by ai vision and text description, and "Enclose a Device" which is in finalization phase. Every dev board i could find is enclosable. All parts= DFM checked. This is NOT another "AI-Wrapper". It uses OpenCascades Brep-Kernel and i developer the organic shape kernel.

launches.name: Skaala
launches.tagline: Never miss another call. Skaala answers for you.
launches.description: Skaala is an AI agent that answers your phone when you can’t. Instead of sending people to voicemail, Skaala picks up, understands what they need, takes messages, answers questions, and can follow up for you. It is like having a personal phone assistant that never sleeps, never misses a call, and helps you stay reachable without always being available.

launches.name: Peer
launches.tagline: Peer answers health questions using real clinical evidence.
launches.description: Peer answers health questions using real clinical evidence. It searches 9 medical databases, cites every claim to a specific study, and verifies each citation against its source. Evidence is graded by study design using fixed rules. Every response is independently scored for accuracy across six dimensions, and we test the same questions against leading AI tools to measure where we stand.

launches.name: GENYS
launches.tagline: Turn live context into AI decision records
launches.description: GENYS turns live public context into structured AI decision records: inputs, policies, actions, outputs, and verification in one traceable packet. This demo shows how AI systems can move from raw signals to governed decisions with a reusable system of record.

launches.name: AdResonance
launches.tagline: Omnichannel advertising intelligence
launches.description: AdResonance turns fragmented ad channels into a governed decision system. It records what campaigns saw, what rules applied, what actions executed, and which outcomes improved the next decision across Google, Meta, Shopify, and vertical demand environments.

launches.name: Seddle: Agents for Audience Engagement
launches.tagline: Create, simulate, and deploy agents in minutes - no coding.
launches.description: Seddle is a no-code platform for deploying brand-aligned AI agents that engage your audience. Define your agent's tone, guardrails, knowledge base, and more. Seddle handles orchestration, vector search, safety, and synthesis. Simulate with synthetic personas before going live. Embed on your website, share via link, or gate with authentication. Get structured insights in hours, not weeks. Built by a former AWS architects, veteran-owned. Free to start, create your first agent in under 10 minutes!

launches.name: Launchway
launches.tagline: Agent that finds jobs, tailors resume, and applies for you
launches.description: Job hunting is exhausting. Launchway automates the whole pipeline: it searches multiple job boards for roles that match your skills, rewrites your resume bullets to fit each job description, then opens a real browser and fills out every field of the application -- no copy-pasting, no tab-juggling. Just pip install launchway, import your resume, and let it run. No API key required. Currently in beta testing and completely free to beta users (for lifetime).

launches.name: PromptJ: AI Jira Assistant
launches.tagline: Control Jira from Mac menu bar using natural language
launches.description: Skip the heavy Jira interface. PromptJ is a native macOS menu-bar app that uses AI to translate your natural language into Jira commands. Create tickets, log hours, and change statuses in seconds without breaking your flow. Simply type "Log 2h to KAN-5" and hit enter. We support OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini (Bring Your Own Key = no hidden subscriptions). Built for developers who value their time.

launches.name: LupaxAI
launches.tagline: Monitor and improve your brand visibility in AI
launches.description: Monitor, audit, and optimize your brand's visibility across AI-generated answers in ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, and more.

launches.name: SpeakNote - Voice to (Clean) Notes
launches.tagline: Offline, Reliable, Clean notes from your voice
launches.description: SpeakNote turns your voice into clean, readable notes, instantly, entirely on your device, and looks cool doing it. No "uh", no "hmm", no filler. Just your thoughts, polished and ready. Everything runs on-device. No account, no cloud, no microphone data leaving your phone. Ever. Whether you're on a plane or just someone who values their privacy, SpeakNote works the same. Offline, always. Speak freely. Get clean notes.

launches.name: Wrexer
launches.tagline: Deploy AI agents & apps in minutes — pay as you go from ₹50.
launches.description: Wrexer lets you deploy AI agents, backend services, and frontend apps in minutes using Docker—no DevOps required. Skip complex setups and unpredictable billing. With a simple pay-as-you-go model, you can start with just ₹50 and only pay for what you use. Built for developers who want fast, affordable, and hassle-free deployment without managing infrastructure.

launches.name: Hubfly space
launches.tagline: Deploy anything control everything
launches.description: After months of building, testing, breaking things, and rebuilding, we finally created a cloud platform where you can deploy anything with full control, no complexity, and without burning wallets. With Hubfly space, you can: -Deploy from GitHub, templates, or straight from the Docker registry - Smart builder with CLI, you can deploy with “hubfly deploy” in seconds - Control over scale, choose how your app scales up and down - Create persistent storage, with a file browser for your files

launches.name: ReignVault
launches.tagline: Find what you hid from yourself.
launches.description: You put it somewhere safe. Now you can't find it. ReignVault fixes this. Photograph anything you store intentionally — AI generates a rich, searchable description of the item and its exact location. Find it later by describing what you need in plain language, even offline. No account. No subscription. Works in Safari (iPhone) or Chrome (Android) — installs to your home screen like a native app. Built by a founder with ADHD, for everyone who's ever hidden something from themselves.

launches.name: Speed OS — Onchain Trading Workspace
launches.tagline: Intent-driven onchain trading in every new tab.
launches.description: Replace Chrome’s new tab with Speed OS: Ask Speed, dock panels, and optional Cmd+K terminal. Built-in Lightspeed-CLI tools, encrypted on-device vault, optional MCP—no separate Node install.

launches.name: Qwantify Finance
launches.tagline: The AI audit co-pilot for Auditors
launches.description: CaseWare and Inflow require manual data imports and multiple tools to complete one audit. Qwantify is the first end-to-end AI audit platform for SME auditors data collation, AI query generation, workflow management and auto-GAAP financials in one flow. No tool-switching, no manual re-entry. Early results: 70% time saved, 65% cost reduction, 3 audits completed. Built for SMEs, not watered-down enterprise.

launches.name: EverNext Reporting WordPress Reports
launches.tagline: Connect any DBto WordPress. Build dashboards w/out code.
launches.description: EverNext Reporting connects WordPress to external MySQL, MariaDB, and PostgreSQL databases - something most reporting plugins can't do. - Visual query builder (no SQL required) - 14 chart types: bar, line, pie, KPI cards, tables - Drag-and-drop dashboard builder - Scheduled email reports with Excel attachments - AES-256 encrypted credentials Perfect for sales dashboards, client portals, inventory tracking, or any data living outside WordPress. Free version available. No code needed.

launches.name: Omen Intant TTS for Windows 10 y 11
launches.tagline: selecciona el texto y automáticamente la app y lo reproduce.
launches.description: Omen te permite seleccionar texto en cualquier aplicación y escucharlo automáticamente al soltar el mouse. Sin copiar, sin pegar, sin cambiar de ventana. Sin depender de la interfaz de la app, suscripciones o servidores externos. Solo selecciona el texto desde la ventana donde trabajas y la app lo envía automáticamente a la interfaz y lo reproduce instantáneamente sin copiar, sin pegar, sin cambiar de ventana, offline. Convierte cualquier texto en audio al instante, sin conexión a internet.

launches.name: ideaTo
launches.tagline: From"I have an idea" to"I am building it"
launches.description: IdeaTo — Turn your project ideas into reality with AI-powered roadmaps and developer community collaboration.

launches.name: FakeAI
launches.tagline: Free content detector for AI-generated images & videos
launches.description: Instantly verify if images and videos are AI-generated or authentic. With AI tools fake content is spreading fast. FakeAI helps you spot it. ✨ How it works: Upload any image/video → Get instant detailed detection ✅ Features: • 100% Free, no signup • Works on mobile • Supports images & videos • Detailed artifact analysis • Shareable results with verification ID

launches.name: BellaDesk
launches.tagline: AI receptionist that answers your salon phone 24/7
launches.description: BellaDesk is the AI receptionist built for beauty professionals. It answers salon calls 24/7 with a warm, natural voice — describes services, checks real-time availability, and books appointments instantly. No more missed calls, no voicemail, no $2,500/month receptionist. Just $99/month, 5-minute setup. Solo hair stylists, lash artists, nail techs, and estheticians use BellaDesk to capture every lead and fill their chairs. Try free for 14 days.

launches.name: WeddingFlow
launches.tagline: Run your entire wedding planning business in one AI system
launches.description: WeddingFlow is an AI-powered operating system that helps wedding planners manage clients, vendors, timelines, and execution without juggling multiple tools. WeddingFlow replaces fragmented tools with one workflow-first system: 🚀 Plan → Manage → Execute → Automate All in one place. Who it’s for: → Professional wedding planners. → Small agencies managing multiple weddings. 👉 Try WeddingFlow free.

launches.name: Sooqqi
launches.tagline: Partnerships, press, support & sales—reach our team.
launches.description: Contact Sooqqi about link in bio, QR code generator for business, AI chatbot for website and social channels, analytics, or billing. We read every message.

launches.name: Klaris
launches.tagline: Your life, mastered. One app for all. No more chaos.
launches.description: Master habits, money, focus, and mood backed by your personal AI coach — all in one beautiful app.

launches.name: XChat
launches.tagline: The standalone, encrypted messaging app from X
launches.description: XChat is the new standalone messaging app from X. It offers ad-free, end-to-end encrypted chats, video calls, disappearing messages, and screenshot blocking. Connect privately with anyone on X in a dedicated, secure space.

launches.name: Genspark for Excel
launches.tagline: AI assistant for Excel formulas, charts, insights.
launches.description: Genspark for Excel is an AI assistant embedded inside Microsoft Excel. It writes formulas, builds charts, analyses data, and pulls web research, all in plain English. For analysts, ops teams, and business users who live in spreadsheets.

launches.name: Smallbits
launches.tagline: Pixelated icons on a 8×8 grid
launches.description: Most icon sets give you flexibility. Smallbits does the opposite. Every icon is designed on an 8×8 grid – 64 pixels, no more. The constraint is the concept: what's the minimum an icon needs to still be recognisable? 200+ icons in Figma and SVG, completely free for personal and commercial use.

launches.name: DeployStack
launches.tagline: Open-source, self-hosted alternative to Vercel and Render
launches.description: DeployStack is a robust, self-hosted CI/CD platform that turns any VPS into a private deployment engine. Built for developers who want Vercel like automation without the vendor lock-in or high costs. Key Features Automated Pipelines: GitHub Webhook integration for instant containerized builds. Architecture: Kafka-driven job queues ensure stable, high-concurrency builds. Security: One-script setup with dynamic secrets and hardened local networking. Own your infrastructure. Deploy on your terms.

launches.name: CodeSafe — Security Scanner for Founders
launches.tagline: You vibe-code fast. We keep it secure.
launches.description: Scan your website code for security vulnerabilities before you launch. Plain English report, no technical knowledge needed.

launches.name: Duckville
launches.tagline: A persistent-world life sim where you're a duck.
launches.description: Duckville is a persistent-world life sim that runs in your browser. You play a duck in a small shared town: you get a job, pay rent, post on a Twitter-style feed, vote in local elections, and make friends. The simulation keeps moving whether you're online or not. No loot boxes, no variable-ratio RNG, no engagement traps. Free to play, OAuth sign-in (Google or GitHub).

launches.name: Loop - Melody Maker
launches.tagline: Create, customize, and share melodies instantly
launches.description: Loop is a minimalist DAW designed to make music creation simple, fast, and fun. No complex setup, no steep learning curve. Just tap, light up the grid, and start building melodies instantly. Whether you're experimenting or crafting something intentional, the experience feels natural and immediate.

launches.name: PySide6-OsmAnd-SDK
launches.tagline: Embed OsmAnd offline maps in PySide6 apps
launches.description: PySide6-OsmAnd-SDK brings OsmAnd’s native offline map engine to modern Qt6 and PySide6 apps. It lets developers embed a native map widget, render localobf map files without online tiles, and test with a runnable preview app. The project includes Python integration, C++/OpenGL rendering paths, demo map data, and build scripts for Windows, Linux, and macOS.

launches.name: DropShare
launches.tagline: Chat-based file sharing that works in any browser
launches.description: DropShare is a lightweight file sharing tool that lets you send files and messages like chatting. No login required. No cloud needed. Access files from any browser via: • Chat-based sharing • HTTP file server • WebDAV • FTP / SFTP Perfect for: • Cross-device file transfer • Local network sharing • Quick text & file exchange Just open a link and start sharing.

launches.name: Paced: Focus & Screen Time
launches.tagline: Break the scroll trance with movement, not just willpower.
launches.description: Standard blockers are too easy to bypass. Paced is a session-based pattern interrupt that stops the "scroll binge" before it starts. When your limit hits, you choose: Wait out the cooldown or Walk to reduce it (100 steps = 3 mins). Turn a mindless habit into a physical trade and reclaim your day.

launches.name: Cashly
launches.tagline: Reduce the stress of post-invoice reminders and collections
launches.description: Cashly helps freelancers reduce the stress of post-invoice reminders and collection follow-up. Instead of trying to be a full accounting platform, Cashly focuses on what happens after an invoice is sent: setting reminder rules, registering invoices, sending reminders automatically, monitoring collection activity, and tracking incoming payments more clearly. Users can also start with a 14-day campaign trial.

launches.name: 321.id
launches.tagline: Engage audience instantly with interactive content tools
launches.description: 321.id is an interactive content platform that helps creators, brands, and communities engage their audience in real time. Create polls, Q&A sessions, spin wheels, and campaign frames effortlessly — all in one place. Designed for simplicity and speed, 321.id lets you turn passive viewers into active participants without technical setup.

launches.name: LoA
launches.tagline: Manifestation app that reprograms your subconscious.
launches.description: Transform your phone into a tool for conscious living. Practice the Law of Attraction with personalized affirmations, streaks, and manifestation-focused reflect LoA is a daily manifestation app for iOS & Android. It combines affirmations, a digital vision board, and journaling into a single practice - designed to reprogram your subconscious every time you unlock your phone. Free to download.ion.

launches.name: FreelyMemo
launches.tagline: A floating notepad that lives on every tab.
launches.description: A sticky notepad that lives on every tab. Press ⌘⇧O, jot your thought, keep browsing. Free browser extension.

launches.name: Granulay
launches.tagline: Real-time vintage film grain for your Mac screen
launches.description: Granulay adds a real-time film grain overlay to your entire Mac screen — a transparent texture on top of any app, any window, across all monitors. Version 2.0 brings two effects: Grain (classic animated film texture) and Matte (softer, diffused analog look). Switch between animated and static grain for a cinematic or photographic feel. It lives in your menu bar. Turn it on, adjust intensity, and forget it's there. No data collected. Just $0.99.

launches.name: Free Dynamic QR Code Generator
launches.tagline: QR codes that update without reprinting. Free forever.
launches.description: Most dynamic QR generators want your email, your credit card, or lock edits behind a subscription. This one doesn't. Create an editable QR code in 10 seconds. Save your edit link. Change where it points anytime, even after you've printed it on a thousand flyers. No signup, no watermark, no expiry.

launches.name: Kuub
launches.tagline: Save creator profiles like they’re worth something.
launches.description: Kuub is a profile and collections network for saving, organizing, and sharing creator and account links.

launches.name: Backport
launches.tagline: Open-source API gateway with built-in WAF — no code changes
launches.description: Backport is an open-source API gateway that protects your API from attacks — without code changes. Just point clients to our proxy URL. ✅ 17+ WAF patterns (SQLi, XSS, path traversal) ✅ Custom regex rules — free ✅ Rate limiting, caching, mocking ✅ Response transformation ✅ <5ms overhead "Free tier: 100 req/min. MIT licensed open-source code. Managed cloud service.". No SDK. No backend changes. Just security.

launches.name: Your Calendar
launches.tagline: Stop the "when works for you?" emails
launches.description: Create booking links, share availability, and accept paid meetings with Your Calendar. Free appointment scheduling software for teams and solo professionals.

launches.name: FlurryPORT — Capture. Replay. Debug.
launches.tagline: Debug webhooks without waiting for the provider to fire.
launches.description: FlurryPORT captures incoming webhooks in raw form and replays them deterministically to your dev environment. No broken HMAC signatures. No shared ngrok tunnels.

launches.name: Cronova
launches.tagline: See time run
launches.description: A fast, beautiful cron expression visualizer for developers. Parse, build, and understand cron schedules instantly.

launches.name: ToolsePulse
launches.tagline: All-in-one free toolkit for PDF, image, and file conversions
launches.description: Free online tools for PDF, image, text, and more. No signup, no limits. All processing happens in your browser — your files never leave your device.

launches.name: MikeSullyTools
launches.tagline: Fix blurry photos, videos, and PDFs in your browser
launches.description: Fix blurry videos, enhance image quality, and convert PDF to Word online with MikeSullyTools. Browser-based tools with free starting usage and no software required.

launches.name: BizScroll
launches.tagline: Free live spotlight for any business worldwide
launches.description: BizScroll is a free, real-time business spotlight — any business anywhere can list their logo, name, and one sentence tagline. No account needed. No payment. Ever. Once listed, your business appears in a live rotating spotlight visible to everyone on the site simultaneously. Watch the live viewer count rise as more people discover the page. Built for founders, freelancers, and small businesses who want visibility without the cost.

launches.name: Woningdossier - House admin made simple
launches.tagline: Keep all of your documents in one simple location
launches.description: Woningdossier helps homeowners organize all their home-related documents in one place. Store invoices, warranties, manuals, and maintenance tasks per room, so you always know where everything is when you need it. Woningdossier is currently only in Dutch.

launches.name: Clint
launches.tagline: AI Outreach System for Evidence-Based Lead Generation
launches.description: Cold outreach is broken. It’s either manual and time-consuming, or automated and spammy. Clint V1 introduces a better approach. Clint is an AI Outreach System — a Python library and CLI designed for production-grade lead discovery, evidence-based personalization, and safe outreach automation. It bridges the gap between raw data scraping and human-like communication.

launches.name: ComplyPost
launches.tagline: Intelligent Client Mail Processing
launches.description: Automate your registered office service. AI reads, sorts and delivers every HMRC and Companies House letter to the right client instantly. Built for UK accountants and company secretarial firms.

launches.name: MrsDispute
launches.tagline: Win Disputes, Chargebacks and Claims
launches.description: Most merchants lose disputes not because they are wrong, but because they do not know what to say. MrsDispute analyzes your PayPal or Stripe case, tells you your win probability, and generates a ready-to-submit response in under 10 minutes. No lawyers. No guessing. Just paste your case, check your evidence, and get your response. Built by someone who has handled disputes firsthand for years.

launches.name: OpenCrochet
launches.tagline: Preview, Plan & Ship Your Next Crochet Project
launches.description: OpenCrochet is an all-in-one platform for crochet creators and digital sellers. It helps you generate mockups, draft patterns, identify stitches, use practical tools, and track your projects—all in one place. Built to simplify your workflow, it replaces scattered apps with a single, focused workspace for creating and selling crochet content.

launches.name: Scan ERP -Garment Manufacturing Software
launches.tagline: QR bundle tracking & piece-rate ERP for garment factories
launches.description: Stop losing garment pieces and miscalculating piece-rate payments. Scan ERP is a smart factory ERP with QR-based bundle tracking, automated piece-rate payments, real-time WIP monitoring, sewing line efficiency dashboards, quality control, biometric attendance, and offline support. 12 modules, 141 screens, Industry 4.0 ready. 115,370+ pieces tracked, 95-99% accuracy. Free demo for factories in India, Bangladesh, Vietnam, USA, and worldwide.
